P1.observational_note: A-stock refuted_on_arrival 0.735, yield 2.87, 9 survivors; B-terse refuted_on_arrival 0.125, yield 13.91, 43 survivors. Direction strongly favours terse on the 12B — opposite of flash.

P3.reason: long run below the 60k decidability floor

root_cause_of_stops.binding_constraint: OpenRouter free tier: 50 model requests per DAY (X-RateLimit-Limit 50, Remaining 0 at run end; resets next UTC midnight). NOT the 1M-token cap and NOT network flakiness.
root_cause_of_stops.consequence: arm C stopped at 6 conjecture calls (< 8 floor) and the long run logged 0 tokens (died on its first call) because the daily request budget was exhausted by arms A+B+C + certification. A long run to the 60k-token decidability floor needs ~30+ calls; the free tier's 50-request/day cap cannot sustain it.

findings.headline: The full JSON-Schema dump is what breaks the 12B; a flat filled example fixes it — INVERTING the flash result. Stock arm A: 73% of candidates refuted on arrival (malformed skeletons), 9 survivors over 98 candidates, yield 2.87/10k. Terse arm B: 12.5% refuted on arrival, 43 survivors, yield 13.9/10k. On flash the same compaction HURT (small_model_burden_report.json); on a true 12B it is the single biggest lever.

three_model_output_failure_modes.1_malformed_nested_json: Dominant in the stock arm. The 12B mismanages bracket bookkeeping: premature object close before prose_notes (Extra data), missing ',' delimiters, raw control chars in strings. These are JSON-STRUCTURE generation failures, not schema-content failures — the harness validates and refutes them correctly.
three_model_output_failure_modes.2_wrong_predicate_language: The 12B writes JavaScript predicates (content.mechanism.includes('...')) treating `content` as a parsed object; in the harness `content` is the raw JSON STRING and eval is Python, so `.mechanism` -> AttributeError -> the candidate self-refutes. ~6-7 stock candidates.
three_model_output_failure_modes.3_token_degradation_at_temp_1: Worst in the compact arm: hallucinated garbled multilingual tokens and invented predicate functions (no(...), not('literal')) that NameError or are vacuously False -> self-refute.

findings.harness_verdict: The machinery behaved correctly in every arm: meter == log per process, byte-replay clean, every refutation valid by the harness's own rules. Zero survivors in stock arm A is entirely the model's malformed output, not a harness fault.

caveats: P1 UNDECIDED as pre-registered: arm C reached only 6 < 8 conjecture calls before the daily request cap. The stock-vs-terse survivor/refute contrast (A vs B) is strong OBSERVATIONALLY but the literal P1 rule (failure_rate halving on C) is undecided; do not report P1 as confirmed.
P3 UNDECIDED: the long-run stress test is UNREACHABLE on the free tier (50 requests/day). Would need a paid tier or a different provider.
n=1 per arm, single seed, two smoke problems; nvidia/nemotron-nano-12b-v2-vl (a vision-language variant — the only 12B nemotron on the free tier) as the ~12B representative.
Arm A ran across two processes (transport crash + resume, 10.5k + 20.8k = 31.4k total); meter_equals_log is per-process, replay_ok verified.
Certification seat spend (1,933 tokens) counts inside the OpenRouter cap.
